intro: Preben meets Marta at a language exchange. She asks him the classic get-to-know-you questions - see how much you already understand.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.en: My name is Preben. And you?

messages.speaker: marta
messages.es: Me llamo Marta. De dónde eres?
messages.en: My name is Marta. Where are you from?

messages.speaker: marta
messages.en: How nice! What is Bergen like?

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Es una ciudad pequeña, pero es la segunda ciudad más grande de Noruega.
messages.en: It's a small city, but it's the second biggest city in Norway.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Está rodeada de montañas y llueve mucho.
messages.en: It's surrounded by mountains and it rains a lot.

words.en: what do you do for work

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Trabajo en informática. Soy ingeniero de datos.
messages.en: I work in IT. I'm a data engineer.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.en: I also work as a consultant.

messages.speaker: marta
messages.es: Qué interesante! Qué haces en tu tiempo libre?
messages.en: How interesting! What do you do in your free time?

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Voy al gimnasio, creo programas y juego a videojuegos.
messages.en: I go to the gym, I create programs and I play video games.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Juego a World of Warcraft y a Counter-Strike.
messages.en: I play World of Warcraft and Counter-Strike.

messages.speaker: marta
messages.en: Awesome! I like talking to you.

questions.prompt: Bergen is the biggest city in Norway.
What does Preben do in his free time?
options: He goes to the gym, creates programs and plays video games
